spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the headline capability the spec promises: auto vs spaces vs none toggle (note none == spaces alias). Aligned with the chromestatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive the demo (buttons, selects/inputs, live script) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is well covered; edge cases / failure modes from the spec (see open questions) are not exercised on this concept page.

references.rationale: Has a see-also block but no explicit chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link on this concept page — the self-heal slug recovery relies on that link being present.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex creeping in, button colours and contrast appear within AA.

openQuestions.title: Measure rendered glyph width, not character count
openQuestions.detail: Density currently uses character count; CJK and Latin glyphs have wildly different widths, so the stress curve under-represents Latin-only annotation. Switch to a getBoundingClientRect-based width readout for honest comparison.

openQuestions.title: Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page
openQuestions.detail: The self-heal recovery script relies on every concept page carrying the canonical chromestatus link in a see-also or references block. Add it: https://chromestatus.com/feature/6560118298771456

summary: Density and rt-length sliders, measured line count and stage height live. Main gaps: Measure rendered glyph width, not character count; Embed the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link in this concept page.
